issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for typical usage scenarios.

scenarios.name: Natural-language queries across employees and departments
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-codes a merge + groupby and never invokes PandasAI; treatment uses SmartDatalake with a list of DataFrames, OpenAI llm config, and .chat() to answer both questions.

scenarios.name: Natural-language cleaning plus chart save
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to pandas + matplotlib with no PandasAI surface; treatment wires SmartDataframe with save_charts/save_charts_path and chains .chat() calls for cleaning and chart generation.
